name: AK-27
note: BO7-native Meta-AR (7.62 Soviet, 690 RPM, 30-round). Voll-Extraktion (Quelle wz_attachment_deltas.md), kanonisiert auf weapon-spez; universelle Slots = BO7-Pool.

Buffer Spring :: -8.1% Gun Kick | -12% Horiz. Recoil | -8% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: Epitaph Extended Mag :: -3.3% ADS Move. | +4.2% ADS Time
Saber Pack Heavy Drum :: -6.4% Move. Speed | -4.2% Crouch Speed | -4.2% Sprint Speed | -6.7% ADS Move. | +8.3% ADS Time | +30.3% Reload Time | +10.5% Sprint to Fire

MUZZLE: EMT3 Compensator :: -19.5% Gun Kick | -20% Vert. Recoil
